safe_public_copy: Visiting medical-student access at Vanderbilt UMC flows through the Vanderbilt University School of Medicine visiting-students program. Applications via VSLO between June and December. Eligibility: U.S. LCME / AOA 4th-year medical students with passing Step 1/2 or COMLEX; affiliation agreement required; $180 non-refundable processing fee.

Visiting medical-student access at UCSF Medical Center flows through the UCSF School of Medicine visiting-student program. Applications via VSLO (AAMC). Eligibility: US medical and osteopathic students in good academic standing; cost not stated by source.
notes: Same shape; cost honestly noted as not stated
